prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile game key art, square splash illustration
Primary request: dark-fantasy evolution art for the Vavarda clicker at level 50, title Archon of Reversal
Scene/background: shattered ritual observatory suspended above a void of rotating runes and broken clockwork halos
Subject: central ascended mage with layered ceremonial armor and a levitating time-rune crown, controlling spiraling rewind magic with one hand and a fractured relic staff with the other
Style/medium: premium dark-fantasy concept art for a mobile game, detailed, elegant, high readability, not photorealistic
Composition/framing: centered character, square crop, strong vertical silhouette, magical orbiting runes framing the torso without clutter
Lighting/mood: arcane eclipse lighting, cold purple energy, subtle gold sparks from temporal distortion, majestic and severe
Color palette: obsidian black, deep plum, luminous violet, pale gold accents, ghostly cyan sparks
Materials/textures: engraved relic metal, crystalline rune glass, layered robes, floating dust, broken marble
Quality: high
Constraints: no text, no logo, no watermark, no frame, no extra monsters, avoid messy composition, keep one dominant character and clear focal point
